## How to test

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Preserves the invariants in `CLAUDE.md` (localhost-only, no API key, local data, sandboxed renderer)
- [ ] No new runtime dependency / no UI build step added (or justified below)
- [ ] Screenshots or clip attached for UI changes
